mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID, A.ADJ_NO, A.ADJ_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS ADJ_TYP_NM, A.VD_CD, A.VD_NM, A.GR_NO, A.ADJ_YM, A.SUPL_ADJ_AMT, A.VAT_ADJ_AMT, A.TOT_ADJ_AMT, A.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, A.REG_ID FROM PA_ADJUST A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='PA_ADJ_TYP' AND T.CD=A.ADJ_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='PA_STS' AND S.CD=A.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.DEL_YN='N'
AND (A.ADJ_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR A.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR A.GR_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND A.STS=#{sts} AND A.VD_CD=#{vdCd} ORDER BY A.ID DESC

SELECT A.ID, A.COMP_CD, A.ADJ_NO, A.ADJ_TYP, T.CD_NM_KO AS ADJ_TYP_NM, A.VD_CD, A.VD_NM, A.GR_ID, A.GR_NO, A.ADJ_YM, A.TAX_TYP, A.SUPL_ADJ_AMT, A.VAT_ADJ_AMT, A.TOT_ADJ_AMT, A.REASON, A.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, A.REMARK, A.REG_ID FROM PA_ADJUST A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE T ON T.GRP_CD='PA_ADJ_TYP' AND T.CD=A.ADJ_TYP AND T.DEL_YN='N' LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='PA_STS' AND S.CD=A.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.ID=#{id} AND A.DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PA_ADJUST (COMP_CD, ADJ_NO, ADJ_TYP, VD_CD, VD_NM, GR_ID, GR_NO, ADJ_YM, TAX_TYP, SUPL_ADJ_AMT, VAT_ADJ_AMT, TOT_ADJ_AMT, REASON, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{adjNo}, NVL(#{adjTyp},'PRICE'), #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, #{grId}, #{grNo}, #{adjYm}, NVL(#{taxTyp},'TAX'), NVL(#{suplAdjAmt},0), NVL(#{vatAdjAmt},0), NVL(#{totAdjAmt},0), #{reason}, NVL(#{sts},'TMP'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE PA_ADJUST SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE PA_ADJUST SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(TOT_ADJ_AMT),0) FROM PA_ADJUST WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='CFM' AND COMP_CD=#{compCd} AND VD_CD=#{vdCd} AND ADJ_YM=#{adjYm}
